# The Course Creator's Launch Week Playbook

How to use the Course Creator Pack across one 7-day launch. ~60 minutes total at the keyboard, replaces ~10-15 hours of writing and customer support.

---

## Day -7 (one week before): Prep (15 min)

**`run_sales_page_critique.bat`**
Paste your current sales page. Get the headline score, the biggest lift, and 3 small wins. Ship the small wins today. Schedule the headline rewrite for tomorrow if it's a heavier lift.

**`run_launch_email_sequencer.bat`**
Paste your product, audience, dates, and any bonuses. Out comes 6 emails with subjects, send timings, and copy. Drop them into your ESP as drafts, schedule sends.

---

## Day -2: Pre-launch tease (5 min)

The Email Sequencer's email #1 is your pre-tease. Edit one or two phrases to match your voice. Send.

---

## Day 0: Cart open (10 min)

Send Email #3 from the sequence — the cart-open email. Watch your inbox.

**`run_customer_qa.bat`** (every pre-purchase question)
For every "is this for me?" / "does it cover X?" question that lands: paste it + your product details. Out comes a fit-honest answer + a backup "not a fit" reply. Use the right one.

---

## Days 1-3: Replies + objections (15 min/day)

Continue **`run_customer_qa.bat`** for new questions. Reply within 4 hours during launch — buyers are deciding now.

If a refund request comes in (yes, even during launch — buyer remorse is fast):

**`run_refund_deescalator.bat`** — paste the request, get the recommendation. If it's retain-with-fix, send the draft. If it's refund-clean, process it without conditions and don't write a defensive reply.

---

## Day 3 or Day 4: Mid-launch push

Send Email #4 from the sequence — the social proof or objection-handling email (whichever the agent recommended).

Do you have buyers from the first 24-48 hours posting positive feedback?

**`run_testimonial_collector.bat`**
For each visible early-positive buyer: paste their context. The agent will tell you whether NOW is the right time to ask (often it isn't yet). Where it says ask_now, send the ask email — quotes that come in same-launch can go straight into Email #5 or #6.

---

## Day 4-5: Final push (10 min)

Send Email #5 (urgency) and Email #6 (final call).

If you're running affiliates and one of them hasn't promoted yet:

**`run_affiliate_outreach.bat`** — paste their info + your terms. Get a personalized nudge that doesn't sound like a marketer. DM-version is great for X / Twitter / Slack reach.

---

## Day 6: Cart close + post-close

Send the post-close recap email (the agent gave you this in the original sequence call).

---

## Day 7+ (post-launch)

**`run_testimonial_collector.bat`** — for each new buyer who completed enough of the product to have an opinion. Most won't be ready yet — the agent will tell you when.

**`run_lesson_outliner.bat`** — when you're ready to plan your next product or expand a lesson, this is the unblocker. Paste the topic + audience + duration. Get an outline you can record from in 60 minutes.

---

## Time math

| Task | Without pack | With pack |
|---|---|---|
| 6-email launch sequence | 4-6 hours | 5 min |
| Sales page critique | $500-2k or 3 hours self-edit | 5 min |
| 30 pre-purchase Q&A replies | 4-5 hours of context-switching | 30 min total |
| 5 refund replies during launch | 1 hour + emotional cost | 10 min total |
| 10 testimonial asks (right timing) | 2 hours, mostly mistimed | 10 min |
| 10 affiliate pitches | 3-4 hours | 10 min |
| 4 lesson outlines | 4-6 hours | 20 min |

**Per-launch time savings:** 15-25 hours.

**Cost:** $0/month (free OpenRouter tier).

That's the whole point.
